title: Aegis Core Model Manifest
description: Schema for /models/manifest.json — model provenance, integrity, and licensing. See ARCHITECTURE.md §10.1.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump when adding required fields or changing semantics.

models.description: List of model artifacts managed by this manifest.

id.description: Unique model identifier. Lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens. Used as a key in code (e.g., ResourceBudget per-model estimates).

filename.description: Upstream filename — preserves the original name from `origin_url` and provides the file extension (e.g., `.bin`, `.gguf`) used to construct the CAS path. The engine CAS preflight walker resolves the on-disk path as `$AEGIS_MODEL_PATH/<id>/<sha256>.<ext>` (ADR-0026 CAS layout), NOT `$AEGIS_MODEL_PATH/<filename>` — `filename` is for extension + provenance only, not path resolution.

type.description: Model role in the Aegis pipeline.

description.description: Human-readable description of the model's purpose and provenance.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the model file. The engine model loader computes the hash at load time and refuses to mmap if it does not match. 'PLACEHOLDER' is allowed only before the model is downloaded for the first time.

size_bytes.description: Expected file size in bytes. Used by the download script to verify transfer integrity.

estimated_ram_bytes.description: Estimated RAM footprint when the model is fully loaded / mmap'd. Used by ResourceBudget (ADR-0010) to compute the fixed overhead at engine startup.

origin_url.description: URL from which the model file can be downloaded. Used by tools/scripts/download_models.sh.

origin_project.description: URL of the upstream project that produced the model weights.

origin_version.description: Upstream release tag, commit hash, or version string that this model was built from.

license.description: SPDX license identifier for the model weights (e.g., 'MIT', 'Apache-2.0'). GPL/AGPL are blocked per ARCHITECTURE.md §10.1 license scanning.

license_url.description: URL to the full license text for the inference library / quantization toolchain.

upstream_model_license.description: SPDX license identifier for the original (pre-quantization) model weights.

upstream_model_license_url.description: URL to the full license text for the original model.

required.description: true iff this model MUST be present at engine startup for the gRPC server to come up — i.e., some engine startup code path unconditionally loads it. false for models that are (a) loaded lazily by opt-in subcommands, (b) not yet wired into any code path, or (c) aspirational/placeholder. The engine CAS preflight walker (ADR-0026 §Engine responsibilities) iterates `required=true` entries only; any drift between this flag and actual engine load paths turns into a false positive (walker fails on a model nobody uses) or false negative (engine crashes mid-run on a model the walker didn't verify). CI drift check (tools/scripts/check_manifest_drift.sh) enforces correspondence between `required=true` entries and engine main startup code.

phase.description: The earliest roadmap phase in which this model is used.

notes.description: Free-form notes about this model entry (RAM estimates, version bump procedures, etc.).
